Elymus species, including Elymus caninus and Elymus repens, have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The herbal preparations of these plants are often used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm their effectiveness.
